description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this slip-on nubuck shoe from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it barefoot and pair it with stylish t-shirts and denims for unparalleled cool look. UpperOne-piece nubuck upper and outsole with rugged stitch detailing on the forefoot and a foldover backfoot overlay with TPR lugsMock lace in nubuck running through eyelets along the wide collarBrand button on the lateral side of the tongueSlip-on style for ease of wearPadded synthetic leather footbed with print for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleCircular and oval TPR lugs spread throughout the outsole for gripShoe careRemove dust and dirt using a nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
